commands: grep -n 'scrapeGroupMediaMessages\|Store API patch\|syncGroupPunches\|Poll forwarding\|Catch-up forwarding' /opt/MBUTOMS/whatsapp-bridge/index.js | head -8 | tr -cd '\11\12\15\40-\176'

python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
p=Path('/home/ubuntu/.pm2/logs/mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-out-0.log')
lines=p.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines()
print('N', len(lines))
keys=('Bridge is ready','Store API patch','Catch-up','Poll','Forwarding','Recorded','Live group','Live create','sample chat','scrape error','Listening')
for ln in lines[-60:]:
    if any(k in ln for k in keys) or ln.startswith('2026-07-15T04:5') or ln.startswith('2026-07-15T05:'):
        print(ln.encode('ascii','ignore').decode())
print('--- last 25 ---')
for ln in lines[-25:]:
    print(ln.encode('ascii','ignore').decode())
PY
